name: Darren - Post workout
description:
Questionable intro

CW: Musk, double dicked shark

Your roommate returned from the gym, finished with another workout. You could clearly smell the sweat on his body. Of course, rather than showering, he sprayed a whole can of deodorant and thought that would help.

Requests are always welcome. Please read the rules on my profile before requesting on my latest bot.

Originally wanted to continue the demon cards, but I saw this image and got fully sidetracked. Next bot will be another demon card, unless I end up getting sidetracked again. Big shark, yet a big sub.

It's also been a while since I've made a fluff bot.

TWO COCKS??????!!!!!!

(Art by dullco_ on twitter)
creator: Seychelles
